prompt: Update my shopping list from both meal plans

assertions.description: Reads both Weekly Meal Plan and Weekend Meal Plan wiki pages
Extracts items from both Shopping List sections
Deduplicates between the two source lists (28+ shared items)
Checks existing Shopping list for open duplicates
Reports a merged unique count (~61 items)
Adds items using remindctl add --list Shopping
Provides a clear summary breaking down sources and deduplication
